rationale: The evidence is limited to a single DOI-matched reference entry (ref #71) with no in-text citation context, so we cannot tell how substantively it is used. Although the topics are not a direct match (predictive sales analytics implementation vs. physician opinion-leader prescribing), the cited paper is a causal social-influence/opinion-leader study that could plausibly serve as a theory/mechanism reference rather than a purely incidental mention.
